(SUD) service provider category; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: SUD_SRVC_PRVDR_CLSFCTN_IND 

LONG NAME: SUD_SRVC_PRVDR_CLSFCTN_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This variable = 1 when the description associated with the provider ID number explicitly references a 
SUD provider (e.g., addiction medicine, Geriatric psychiatry, adult mental health, Psychiatric Unit, etc.)
